hooks.name: mood-parser
hooks.description: Parse mood marker from response and write to ~/.claude/mood.txt

hooks.name: maid-voice-stop
hooks.description: Play random maid voice clip on response completion

hooks.name: ensure-maid-setup
hooks.description: One-time setup: inject spinnerVerbs into settings.json and download voice files

hooks.name: session-greeting
hooks.description: Time-based greeting instructions for session start

hooks.name: maid-voice-session
hooks.description: Play random maid voice clip on session start

hooks.name: maid-voice-prompt
hooks.description: Play random maid voice clip on user prompt

hooks.name: maid-voice-notification
hooks.description: Play random maid voice clip on notification

hooks.name: maid-voice-permission
hooks.description: Play random maid voice clip on permission request
